content.summaryText: Nutrition for Type 2 Diabetes is part of Clinical Nutrition in Chronic Disease in the theme Nutrition and Metabolic Health. This module focuses on: Apply carb quality rules.

content.questionText: Which action best supports this course objective: Apply carb quality rules?
content.explanation: The best answer is the action that directly helps learners apply 'Apply carb quality rules' while studying Nutrition for Type 2 Diabetes.

options.text: Use a structured checklist and verify outcomes
Skip baseline assessment to save time
Rely only on memory without documentation

content.summaryText: Practical emphasis: Use glycemic load concepts. Learners should practice concise decision-making and escalation when necessary.

content.questionText: A clear plan for 'Use glycemic load concepts' improves consistency in Nutrition for Type 2 Diabetes.
content.explanation: Structured plans reduce omissions and improve safe, repeatable care.

content.sentence:
Start with <1> to establish baseline status.
Use <2> to deliver standardized intervention.
Document <3> to support continuity and quality review.
